description: CompositionNavy blue sleeveless V-neck top made of 100% cotton, with an uneven hemline, three rows of running stitch along the hemline, and graphic print on the frontFittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironIt's the world of women, and wild women at that! And so believes jealous 21 too, and has doled out this absolutely wild woman navy blue top for you. The three lines of running stitch above the hemline adds to this top a subtle feminine style statement, while the bold print of the women of today boasting of equality and taming a tiger speaks volumes of female power. Team this with jeans, shorts or skirts and flaunt your new woman attitude in style.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
